content:
Hi, Goya has raised the verification criteria for entering the server and also improved Automod's spam processing settings.
Goya is also continuing to select suitable garbage advertising processing bots. If you have good bots, you can recommend them to me. Thank you very much<:pray:1356053116260454534>

Goya looked into this feature and found that it requires enabling the membership. We had already wanted to recharge the DC membership before, but encountered some issues. <:Bleed:1400771547710361640> 
 Due to staff changes, we currently cannot determine which team member's bank card was used to bind the channel and are still working on resolving it<:Clown:1400771541423226971>
thank you goya! I bought discord nitro & gave 2 boosts to the server <:rich:1356085282604322826> I hope it helps!
Thank you so much🥺 💗 . We will try again<:please:1356053110375714817>
